candidateAngle: Backend developer focused on Python and FastAPI for scalable services and data-driven applications.
primaryStory: Built backend services and REST APIs with Python and Django for financial workflows
Developed FastAPI applications with PostgreSQL for data processing and integrations
Created responsive React dashboards for operational visibility and user interaction
Implemented automated data pipelines for real-time analytics and reporting
secondaryStory: Experience with AI-driven workflows and integrations using OpenAI API
summaryGoal: Highlight backend development experience with Python and FastAPI; emphasize data processing and integration skills while showcasing relevant projects and technologies.
skillsStrategy: Categories: Languages, Frameworks, Data Tools, Focus Areas
Supporting: PostgreSQL, React, ETL Pipelines, REST API Design
Trim last: remove less relevant skills like Java and JavaScript

sectionStrategy.summary: Showcase backend development and data processing expertise
sectionStrategy.experience: Highlight hero experience with a focus on backend services and integrations
sectionStrategy.projects: Emphasize hero projects demonstrating relevant technologies and outcomes
sectionStrategy.skills: Present skills in order of relevance to the role
sectionStrategy.education: Light—credentials frozen; trim highlights only if they sharpen scan.

layoutStrategy: Show summary to position candidate effectively
Prioritize experience and projects for visibility
layoutRationale: Summary provides a strong introduction to the candidate's focus and skills
Experience and projects demonstrate relevant capabilities and achievements
Skills section supports the technical requirements of the role
selectionRationale: Selected experience and projects directly align with Python Developer role
Focused on backend development and data processing, which are key for the position
rewriteGoals: Land BitGo: emphasize backend services and architecture contributions
Land Taylor.io: highlight FastAPI and PostgreSQL integrations for resume parsing
Land SentimentTrader: focus on real-time analytics and data pipeline design
avoid: No unsupported claims about cross-functional collaboration without evidence
Avoid mentioning backend frameworks not evidenced in the resume
